title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Medical Officer to join our dynamic team in Bhubaneswar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates:
Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates!
